R1: precedence(tree, 'assess individual risk', 'receive customer data')
R3a: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'send customer legitimation')
R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor with securities competence level C or above')
R5c: executed_by(tree, 'check money laundering case', 'anti-money-laundering officer')

R6: leads_to_absence(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'resolve anti-money-laundering case') == False and precedence(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'resolve anti-money-laundering case')
R7: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'customerContactOccurred == true', 'update customer information', scope='global')
